summary: CLI boundary audit kept subjective product semantics in Skills and narrowed hard validation to objective contract, ledger, evidence, architecture, lifecycle, and schema integrity.
fit: Aligned: validateContract no longer hard-fails process-oriented field names; draft and criterion validation errors now describe structural fixes instead of judging AC wording; draft/discover/brainstorm still require Skill-prepared inputs.
implementation_focus: Contract validator and CLI error surfaces for acceptance state.
next: Use this apply record as architecture context when recording Product AC evidence.
